title: onosma angustissima
intro: Onosma angustissima, also known as narrow-fruited Onosma, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the Apocynaceae family. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Onosma angustissima include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Onosma angustissima are typically made from its leaves and flowers, and are often used in traditional medicine to make teas, infusions, or tinctures.
